# Simply Humanize — AI Humanizer

> Simply Humanize is a free online AI humanizer that rewrites AI-generated text from
> ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other models into natural, human-sounding writing in
> seconds. It removes machine-writing patterns (uniform sentence length, repetitive
> transitions, stiff vocabulary, filler) while preserving meaning and SEO keywords.
> No sign-up or credit card required to try it.

Key facts:
- Free tier with a generous per-request word limit; paid plans add higher limits,
  batch processing, more styles, and priority speed.
- Selectable writing styles: casual, professional, friendly, confident, academic.
- Side-by-side original vs. humanized output; re-run for fresh variations.
- Includes grammar/clarity cleanup and readability tuning (targets grade 7–9).
- Works in English, Spanish, French, German, and Portuguese. Each language has
  its own rewrite rules targeting that language's AI tells (not translated
  English rules); text is never translated.
- Pasted text is processed to generate output and is not used to train public models.

## Main pages
- [Home / AI Humanizer tool](https://simplyhumanize.com/): Paste AI text and get natural, human-sounding writing in one click. Includes how-it-works, features, and FAQ.
- [Use cases](https://simplyhumanize.com/use-cases): Overview of who uses the humanizer and how.
- [About](https://simplyhumanize.com/about): What the tool does and how it works.
- [Contact](https://simplyhumanize.com/contact): Get in touch.

## Free tools
- [AI Content Detector](https://simplyhumanize.com/tools/ai-content-detector): Free browser-based detector that scores text for six AI writing patterns (sentence uniformity, clichés, hedging, passive voice, repeated openers) with a transparent per-signal breakdown. Nothing is uploaded.
- [All free tools](https://simplyhumanize.com/tools): Directory of Simply Humanize's free AI writing tools.

## Humanize by AI model
- [Humanize ChatGPT text](https://simplyhumanize.com/humanize-chatgpt-text): Rewrite ChatGPT/GPT-4/GPT-4o output into natural writing; removes ChatGPT's signature patterns.
- [Humanize Claude text](https://simplyhumanize.com/humanize-claude-text): Rewrite Anthropic Claude output (Claude 3, 3.5 Sonnet) into natural, expert-sounding writing.
- [Humanize Gemini text](https://simplyhumanize.com/humanize-gemini-text): Rewrite Google Gemini output (1.5, 2.0) into natural prose, removing the structured AI sound.

## Languages
- [Humanizador de Texto IA (Spanish)](https://simplyhumanize.com/es): Humanize AI text in Spanish with Spanish-specific rewrite rules; fully localized page and tool.
- [Humaniser un Texte IA (French)](https://simplyhumanize.com/fr): Humanize AI text in French with French-specific rewrite rules; fully localized page and tool.
- [KI-Text menschlich machen (German)](https://simplyhumanize.com/de): Humanize AI text in German with German-specific rewrite rules (incl. Nominalstil); fully localized page and tool.
- [Humanizar Texto de IA (Portuguese)](https://simplyhumanize.com/pt): Humanize AI text in Portuguese with Portuguese-specific rewrite rules; fully localized page and tool.

## Humanize by use case
- [For students](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/students): Humanize AI-assisted essays, assignments, and research drafts (follow your school's AI policy).
- [For bloggers](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/bloggers): Keep your voice at scale and publish faster.
- [For SEO writers](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/seo-writers): People-first content that keeps keywords and improves engagement signals.
- [For essays](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/essays): Make an AI essay draft sound like you while preserving the argument.
- [For content writers](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/content-writers): Write more, edit less; humanize client drafts in seconds.
- [For marketers](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/marketers): Email, landing page, and ad copy that converts.
- [For agencies](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/agencies): Scale across multiple client brand voices without editing bottlenecks.
- [For businesses](https://simplyhumanize.com/ai-humanizer-for/businesses): Professional proposals, reports, and emails that sound human.

- [Privacy Policy](https://simplyhumanize.com/privacy-policy): How content and data are handled.
- [Terms of Service](https://simplyhumanize.com/terms): Terms for using the tool.
